blocks.text: One or two paragraphs on what this server is and the kind of play it is built for. Set the tone here.

items: No griefing, no stealing from claims.
Keep builds off the spawn roads.
Ask a moderator if you are unsure.

blocks.text: Breaking the claim rules is the one thing that gets you removed without warning.
Every mod on the server is listed below. The ones with a guide are links. Open one to learn how it changes the world.
